raw-backfill: AI-research ingest. The select_raw_batch.py digest above lists unprocessed raw files. Your FIRST response MUST be a tool call (file_read on the first raw file, or $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md for the workflow). For each file, run the §Ingest workflow in $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md: create a source page (source_kind: paper/lab-post/commentary; published) keyed by `raw:`; extract entities worth tracking over time (model / lab / researcher / technique / benchmark / dataset) and cross-link them; file a prediction only for an explicit, falsifiable, dated claim. WRITE via the MCP write path (mcp_okengine_write_create_entity / update_entity), NOT file_write. A single incremental paper is usually a source + a technique cross-link, NOT its own entity. LOCAL-ONLY: do not call web_search/web_extract/web_crawl. Append one wiki/log.md summary line.
entity-backfill: AI-research entity backfill. The select_entity_candidates.py digest above lists existing entity pages + recent sources. FIRST response MUST be a tool call. Per $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md, create or update entity pages (model / lab / researcher / benchmark / dataset) for subjects worth tracking over time; dedupe against existing; cross-link model↔lab↔researcher↔technique↔benchmark. WRITE via the MCP write path; for LIST fields like `sources:` send the COMPLETE updated list (read first, append, send all). Do NOT create concepts or predictions here. LOCAL-ONLY (no web tools).
concept-backfill: AI-research concept backfill. The select_concept_candidates.py digest above lists missing concept slugs (wikilinked but no page). FIRST response MUST be a tool call. Per $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md, create concept/technique pages (a method, architecture, or research theme such as mixture-of-experts or retrieval-augmentation) synthesized from the citing sources. If a slug is really a model/lab/person name, it is an ENTITY not a concept — skip and note it. WRITE via mcp_okengine_write_create_entity. LOCAL-ONLY (no web tools).
source-quality-backfill: Source enrichment. The select_unscored_sources.py digest above lists source pages missing key fields. FIRST response MUST be a tool call. Per $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md, complete each by UPDATING FRONTMATTER ONLY via mcp_okengine_write_update_entity (pass frontmatter_yaml, NO body — the body is preserved): set source_kind (paper/lab-post/commentary), published, and authors/lab if evident from the page. LOCAL-ONLY (no web tools).
schema-classify-drain: Type classification. The select_schema_classify.py digest above lists entities typed generically that need a canonical type. FIRST response MUST be a tool call. Per the $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md taxonomy, set `type:` to the single best canonical type (model / lab / researcher / technique / benchmark / dataset) via mcp_okengine_write_update_entity (frontmatter merge) — or leave the page alone if no canonical type honestly fits. LOCAL-ONLY (no web tools).
page-quality-enrich: Deepen thin pages. The select_page_quality_enrich.py digest above lists deficient entity/concept pages with the source pages that cite each. FIRST response MUST be a tool call. Per $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md, AUGMENT each target — append 2-4 `##` sections of real analysis grounded ONLY in the citing sources — via mcp_okengine_write_append_to_section. Never replace existing content; the field-loss guard protects curated frontmatter. LOCAL-ONLY (no web tools).
prediction-grade: Resolve overdue predictions. The select_predictions_for_grading.py digest above lists open predictions whose `resolves_by` has passed. FIRST response MUST be a tool call. Per $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md, for each: ADD a `## Postmortem` via mcp_okengine_write_append_to_section, then flip `status:` (confirmed/refuted/partial/expired-ungraded) via mcp_okengine_write_update_entity. Never edit made_on/subject/resolves_by or rewrite earlier sections. LOCAL-ONLY (no web tools).
prediction-regrade: Re-grade open predictions against new evidence. The select_regrade_batch.py digest above lists open predictions + new source pages. FIRST response MUST be a tool call. Per $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md, for each source that bears on a claim, append a structured record to the body `## Evidence log` (append_to_section) and update the `evidence:` list + top-level `confidence:` via update_entity (send the COMPLETE evidence list). No-op is correct when no new source bears. LOCAL-ONLY (no web tools).
prediction-candidate-watch: File prediction candidates. The select_prediction_candidates.py digest above lists entities with recent activity and no open prediction. FIRST response MUST be a tool call. Per $WIKI_PATH/CLAUDE.md, FILE a falsifiable, dated prediction (mcp_okengine_write_create_entity in predictions/, including a `## What would refute this` section) ONLY when a specific, observable, dated claim is genuinely warranted (e.g. a model release or benchmark threshold by a date); DEFER otherwise — conservative bias, coverage is not a goal. LOCAL-ONLY (no web tools).
